  1. Home

About BeiLuo - Your Trusted Infineon Authorized Distributor

BeiLuo Electronics was founded in 2010 in Shenzhen, China, with a clear mission: to become the most reliable Infineon authorized distributor for engineers and procurement teams across Asia and beyond. Over the past fourteen years, BeiLuo has grown from a regional electronics supplier into one of the Top 8 Electronic Component Distributors in China by annual volume, serving customers in automotive, industrial automation, motor drive, renewable energy, and consumer electronics markets. Our relationship with Infineon Technologies spans the full product portfolio - microcontrollers, power semiconductors, and sensors - ensuring that our customers have access to genuine, fully traceable Infineon stock at every stage of their product lifecycle. BeiLuo maintains a bonded warehouse in Shenzhen with over 10,000 active Infineon part numbers, allowing us to respond to urgent prototype orders and large production schedules with equal confidence and speed. What sets BeiLuo apart from general-purpose distributors is our Field Application Engineering team, which launched in 2016 with five dedicated engineers and has since grown alongside our customer base to keep pace with rising design-in demand. Our FAE engineers bring deep expertise in embedded systems, power electronics, and automotive functional safety, enabling hands-on support from initial component selection through production qualification. We do not simply ship components - we help customers choose the right Infineon device, optimize circuit designs, and navigate import logistics with confidence. BeiLuo's customs clearance expertise is a strategic advantage for international customers. Our dedicated import compliance team manages Infineon component shipments through Chinese customs with complete documentation, minimizing clearance delays and protecting customer production schedules. This logistics competency, combined with our technical service depth, has earned BeiLuo recognition as a trusted long-term supply partner. Today, BeiLuo continues to invest in inventory depth, FAE capability, and customer service infrastructure to meet growing global demand for Infineon components.

Our Journey

2010

Founded in Shenzhen

BeiLuo Electronics was established in Shenzhen with an initial focus on distributing Infineon power semiconductors to industrial customers in the Pearl River Delta region.

2013

Infineon Authorized Distributor Status

BeiLuo achieved formal Infineon authorized distributor recognition, enabling direct sourcing from Infineon's supply chain with full product traceability and factory-grade quality assurance.

2016

FAE Team Expansion

BeiLuo launched a dedicated Field Application Engineering program, hiring five experienced FAEs specializing in automotive MCU, power IGBT, and sensor applications to support customer design-in activities.

2019

Bonded Warehouse and Logistics Upgrade

BeiLuo opened a 2,000 square meter bonded warehouse in Shenzhen, enabling same-day fulfillment on over 5,000 Infineon part numbers and establishing dedicated customs clearance procedures for international export.

2022

Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor Recognition

BeiLuo was ranked among the Top 8 Electronic Component Distributors in China by annual procurement volume, reflecting sustained growth across automotive, industrial, and renewable energy customer segments.

2024

10,000+ Part Number Inventory Milestone

BeiLuo's active Infineon stock catalog exceeded 10,000 part numbers, covering MCU, IGBT, MOSFET, and sensor product families with buffer stock programs for key automotive and industrial accounts.

Why Choose BeiLuo as Your Infineon Distributor

10,000+ Infineon Part Numbers in Stock

BeiLuo's bonded warehouse in Shenzhen holds over 10,000 active Infineon part numbers across MCU, IGBT, MOSFET, and sensor families. Every item ships with certificate of conformance and full date-code lot traceability, eliminating counterfeit risk from secondary market sourcing.

Expert FAE Support Within 24 Hours

Our Field Application Engineering team responds to technical inquiries within one business day. FAEs provide device selection guidance, schematic review, thermal simulation assistance, and reference code for Infineon AURIX, XMC, and power semiconductor products - services normally reserved for high-volume OEM accounts.

Genuine Infineon Authorized Sourcing

As an Infineon authorized distributor, BeiLuo sources every component directly from Infineon's authorized supply chain. Customers receive factory-original devices with manufacturer warranty coverage, AEC-Q100 or AEC-Q101 qualification documentation where applicable, and anti-counterfeit verification on request.

Expert Import and Customs Clearance

BeiLuo's dedicated customs compliance team manages all Infineon import documentation including HS code classification, customs valuation, and certificate of origin. International customers benefit from streamlined clearance that typically reduces border delays by 2 to 3 days compared to self-managed imports.

24-Hour Quotation and Fast Global Delivery

BeiLuo guarantees a formal price and availability quotation within 24 business hours for all Infineon stock inquiries, with competitive pricing and blanket order or consignment arrangements available for predictable annual volumes. Orders ship via DHL, FedEx, and UPS express to customers in over 40 countries, dispatched within 24 hours of payment confirmation with typical delivery in 3 to 5 business days.

Trusted by Leading Manufacturers

EV Manufacturer

Supplied Infineon AURIX TC3xx MCUs for battery management system controllers, reducing component lead time from 16 weeks to 5 days.

Industrial Automation OEM

Provided Infineon XMC4700 MCUs and IKW40N120H3 IGBTs for servo drive platform, with FAE design review that eliminated one board respin.

Solar Inverter Manufacturer

Stocked H3 IGBT buffer inventory under a blanket order, protecting customer production schedule across two quarters of component market tightness.

Home Appliance OEM

Delivered Infineon CoolMOS and OptiMOS MOSFETs for inverter compressor motor drive, with BeiLuo customs clearance reducing import cycle time by three days.

Infineon Customs Declarations — Proof of Genuine Sourcing

As an Infineon authorized distributor, BeiLuo provides complete import documentation for every shipment of Infineon stock, giving customers verifiable proof of genuine, traceable sourcing.
